title: Item Transport Tubes
description: Glass now also functions as item transport tubes, like a hopper that can go any direction.
body:
## Description
This datapack simply turns glass into item transport tubes. Any items fired inside of glass will travel through the glass, like a hopper that can go any direction. Any glass works, and different glasses will not interfere with each other.

## Video Showcase: youtu.be/0Op6eGnb0BM

## Usage in Videos [​YouTubers Please Read]

Feel free to use this creation in your video however I do ask a couple of basic things.
1. Do not imply/claim the creation as your own. To avoid this, it would be appreciated if you could please mention in the video that Scommander created this datapack.
2. Provide credit in the description - linking to my YouTube channel and this download page.
3. Feel free to let me know! It’s nice to watch my creations being put to use :)
Redistribution
Please link to this download page and do not reupload the creation without my permission.


## Support Me By Donating?
As a University student working a part-time job, donations help to justify the time creating/coding content. No pressure of course!
💸 PayPal: https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=GDRYDGBP2B4FY
